data.name: General Translation Agent
data.description: Provides large model-based multilingual translation services, including general translation, paraphrase translation, two-step translation, and three-pass translation strategies. It supports automatic language detection, glossary customization, translation suggestions, and streaming output.

data.name: Popular Special Effects Video Agent
data.description: Popular special effects videos are intelligent templates launched based on trending features from pan-entertainment platforms, designed to precisely adapt to short video creative production needs. Currently, three effect templates are available: French Kiss, Body Shake Dance, and Sexy Me.

data.name: GLM Slide/Poster Agent
data.description: An intelligent creation agent built for working people and creators. It goes beyond traditional engineering-style assembly tools—supporting one-click generation of slides or posters from natural language instructions. By natively integrating content generation with layout aesthetics and design conventions, it helps you quickly produce polished, professional-grade materials while lowering design barriers and boosting creative efficiency.

data.name: glm-5v-turbo
data.description: A multimodal agent foundation model with native integration of vision and language capabilities. It delivers elegant visual programming, while excelling in long-term planning, complex programming, and action execution.

data.name: glm-4.6v
data.description: Z.ai’s multimodal model with a 128k training context window and SoTA visual understanding. It also introduces native Function Calling, linking visual perception with executable actions for real-world multimodal agents.

data.name: glm-5.1
data.description: Z.ai's new flagship foundation model with significant gains on long-horizon tasks, support for 8-hour autonomous work, engineering-grade deliverables, and Claude Opus 4.6-level performance.

data.name: glm-5.1
data.description: Z.ai's new flagship foundation model with significant gains on long-horizon tasks, support for 8-hour autonomous work, engineering-grade deliverables, and Claude Opus 4.6-level performance.

data.name: glm-5
data.description: Z.ai flagship reasoning model with stronger coding, more reliable multi-step reasoning and execution, improved complex agent task performance, more natural conversation, and better front-end generation quality.

data.name: glm-4.7
data.description: GLM-4.7 series model with enhanced programming, stable multi-step reasoning and execution, better complex agent task performance, more natural dialogue, and improved front-end aesthetics.

data.name: glm-5-turbo
data.description: Base model deeply optimized for the OpenClaw scenario, delivering true executability in complex, dynamic, and long-chain tasks.

data.name: glm-4.5-air
data.description: Lightweight GLM-4.5 model delivering strong cost-effectiveness and high performance.

data.name: glm-4.7-flash
data.description: 30B lightweight, efficient, high-performance GLM-4.7 model that outranks similar-scale open-source models on multiple leaderboards.

data.name: glm-4-32b-0414-128k
data.description: General-purpose, cost-efficient LLM for advanced Q&A, coding, search, and structured task automation across business and technical domains.
